title: Federal Reserve Board - 2025 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This is an index page listing Federal Reserve FOMC press releases and economic projections from 2025. The page contains only dates and titles of 13 separate announcements from January through December 2025, with links to individual statements. No substantive policy content, rate decisions, or projection details are present in this listing. This is a navigation/aggregation page, not an archiveable research document.

No actual policy content, rate decisions, or statement text included
Individual announcements require separate URL access for substantive content
